query:
INSERT INTO messages (task_id, run_id, mode, body_md, sha, role)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
            ON CONFLICT (task_id, run_id, mode)
            DO UPDATE SET
                body_md = EXCLUDED.body_md,
                sha = EXCLUDED.sha,
                role = EXCLUDED.role,
                created_at = NOW()
